title: Hive File Format Comparison and Decision Flow
description: A visual comparison of common Hive file formats (TextFile, SequenceFile, RCFile, ORC, Parquet) and a decision flow for choosing the appropriate format based on use case requirements.
relationships: Compares storage efficiency and performance of each format
Guides user through a decision tree based on their specific needs (e.g., analytical query speed vs. write speed) to select the optimal format
